3240540.name: [Stories to Tell] Greyville Stay
3240540.description:
"Stories to Tell" is a series of psychological horror games developed by a 15-year-old boy in which each installment is based on a dream or nightmare that I, the developer, have had. This is a game you won't want to miss...

Hello, my name is zebaxx, I am a 15-year-old Spanish game developer. I had this nightmare in the summer of 2023. I remember it clearly because I always write down my nightmares when I wake up.

In [Stories to Tell] Greyville Stay I had just gotten home one normal afternoon after a long day, when I suddenly realized that some pretty strange things were happening at home...

[The game is approximately 15-20 minute]

[The aspect ratio can be changed in the SETTINGS menu]

Gameplay

Stories to Tell is a walking simulator, with dialogues between the character and npc`s. The game is in first person and it includes things such as being able to play games in your in-game pc and more...

key features of [Stories to Tell] Greyville Stay

-VHS aesthetics.

-Dialogues between characters.

-VHS Aspect Ratio.

*Whishlist now to support me :)*
3240540.supported_languages:
英语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
